summary:
The Frankfort horizontal plane is defined by a line connecting the porion (tip of the external auditory meatus) to the orbitale (lowest point of the orbital rim). Nasion, while used in other reference planes, is not part of this specific definition.  

End summary.

End summary.. Answer choice: D
